column1: # - Add one row per protocol per month you want to assert.
# - Only columns with values are asserted; leave others blank.
# - caseId: stable id for the test scenario (e.g. "excel-example", "protocol-1")
# - protocolId: must match a protocol in src/stores/treatmentProtocols.js (e.g. "philippines-htn")
# - patientsUnderCare, targetEnrolment, treatmentAdherence, forecastMonths: scenario inputs
# - expectedCumulativeEnrolment: cumulative enrolment for that month
# - patientsTreated: treated patients for that month (adherence + enrolment logic)
# - stepTablets_N: tablets for protocol step N in that month (uses current protocol step drugIds + %)
# - otherTablets_N: tablets for "other drug" line N in that month
# - drug_<drug-id>: aggregated tablets per drug id in that month (optional)
# - stepPct_N / otherPct_N: optional overrides of the protocol % assumptions (optional)
# - cost_<drug-id> or drugCost_<drug-id>: required overrides of cost per tablet (required for every drug used by that protocol)
# - totalCost: optional assertion of full-year total cost (sum of per-drug lineCost)
# - drugLineCost_<drug-id>: optional assertion of full-year cost for a drug id
# - drugTotalTablets_<drug-id>: optional full-year tablets per drug (only if no breakdown Total row; see Excel block notes)
# - stepCost_N / cumulativeCost_N: optional assertion of step cost & running cumulative (same as Cost by protocol step; N = step 1..)
#   Excel blocks can paste sub-tables after the monthly table: Drug | Tablets | Cost + Total, then Step | Step cost | Cumulative cost (see Test 1).
# Tip: start by asserting the "core" three columns + a couple stepTablets_N columns. Add more as needed.
# Example row matching the screenshot's enrolment/adherence math (fill tablet columns from your 3 protocol datasets).
# Put base inputs in @meta, then paste the 12-row month table from Excel as TSV.
# Any extra columns you paste are ignored unless they match a protocol step label / other drug label.
# Excel block: breakdown = Month 1..N, Total, By drug table, Step-cost table (all required; no flags).
# By drug: Protocol drugs then optional Other drugs row (A–Z)
# -- Percentage overrides & 2 drugs in single step --
# By drug Protocol drugs then optional Other drugs row (A–Z)
# By drug Protocol drugs then optional Other drugs row (A–Z)
